title: “Those flirty texts”: Perez Hilton reacts as Prince Harry resurfaced chats with journalist raise concerns for Meghan Markle
summary_full: Prince Harry’s old flirty messages with journalist Charlotte Griffiths have come out during his court case against Associated Newspapers. The chats, from 2011–2012, have sparked reactions, including from Perez Hilton. Reports say Meghan Markle is upset as the messages go public. Prince Harry has said he ended contact after learning Griffiths was a journalist. The court decision is still pending.
